events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the submitted package is missing the quantity takeoff/area count needed to reconcile the photographed rebar placements against the placing drawings, I marked this `needs_more_info` (not a pass/fail on defects) — the photos show no evident defects, but completeness can't be verified without that missing data. Flagged the takeoff as the required next step before scoring.
